blocks.content: The Operator's pure smile on the big screen felt like a twist to the users.
It was far from the divine beauty they had imagined…

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: She's pretty.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: But she could smile just like them.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yeah, she's pretty.
As Yahweh2 pulled his arm out, the Operator staggered back and slowly lifted her head.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I lost. And the Solar War too. By the time I revive, everything will probably be over…
High Gear overloaded.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Enjoy it to the end.
As her engine exploded, her machine shattered into pieces and disappeared.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Wow!
East Country users cheered.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Charge! Charge the Solar Palace!
Since the system allowed for revival, the end of the Solar War was always one side's annihilation.
As the balance of power rapidly collapsed, West Country users dwindled by the hundreds.
East Country users surged like a massive wave, completely taking over the Solar Palace.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: We've arrived! We've arrived!
Though part of the third team, Destroyer707 could enter because he belonged to Golden Wheel.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Come on, you bastards!
Shouting boldly as he looked inside, he saw no West Country rankers.
The only survivor, Little Witch, raised her hands in surrender.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: I surrender. Don't kill me. The rankers won't revive for a while anyway.
Though death was common, Uorin wanted to stay until the end to watch Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Sorry.
Yolga's son raised his gun.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: We can't leave any variables. Golden Wheel's motto is to handle things thoroughly.
As he aimed at her forehead, waiting for the critical hit, Little Witch muttered.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: …You bastard.
Fermi laughed cheerfully.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Come back next time.
Fermi found dealing with Uorin much easier than with Shirone or the Operator.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: She's not a troublemaker.
A single gunshot rang out, and Little Witch fell backward.
Finally, with all West Country rankers gone from the Solar Palace, only the capture remained.
Seeing Yahweh2 approaching on the screen, Fermi spoke to Destroyer707 and his team.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Hey, you guys.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yes? Yes!
As the guild leader called, they ran over nervously.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Want to give it a try?

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Try what?
Fermi pointed to Low Gear in the solar furnace.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Capturing it.
Entering the user code into Low Gear from the siege side would determine the Solar War's outcome.
Conversely, the defending side would win if they held out for 24 hours.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Me?
Usually, rankers captured Low Gear unless the situation was urgent.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Yes. Since you're part of Golden Wheel, you can earn the primary defense guild qualification.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: But there are rankers…
Haha! It's okay. They're all my employees.
Golden Wheel was a professional group focused on making money, so the honor of the Solar War didn't matter.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Besides…

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: He'll like it.
A customer who complained if they weren't 100% satisfied, even if they liked 99%.

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: Let's do it. When will we get another chance like this? All High Gear users will be watching us.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Right?
Even now, the video was rolling, so Destroyer707 straightened up.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Then I'll…
With Death Princess and Strongest Code Name by his side, he headed to Low Gear.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: It's cold.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Everything felt vivid, yet he felt nothing.
Representing the East Country, Destroyer707.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: This is the weight of the crown.
Realizing his emotions, he stopped and sneered.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Heh.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: His lips trembled.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: I'm… feeling fear?

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: What are you doing? Everyone's watching. If you won't do it, I will.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: I'll do it.
Taking a deep breath, Destroyer707 opened Low Gear's core and reached out.
As his palm touched it, the gauge for changing Low Gear's user quickly filled.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Whoooa!

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: You don't have to shout.
As Strongest Code Name smiled, a message appeared on Low Gear's screen.
User change complete. Code name Destroyer707.
Transmitting Low Gear's power to the East Country.
All East Country users, who had been waiting for this moment, raised their hands.

blocks.speaker: East Country users
blocks.content: We won!
Bullets pierced the sky, and Destroyer707's team hugged and jumped in joy.
As Yolga's son turned, he saw Yahweh2, who had arrived with a smile.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: Good.
Seeing Fermi's satisfied expression, he sighed in relief.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: Now help me out too.
The Solar War has ended. By operator privilege, all users will revive fully charged.
The world was enveloped in light.
As East Country users gathered at the Solar Palace, West Country users revived at the outskirts of the plateau.
The Solar War rankings are being tallied.
The rankings, considering accumulated damage and user destruction counts, were displayed from 1st to 100th place.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh2
blocks.content: What a shame. He was the star of this Solar War.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's because it ended too early. If it had lasted over 12 hours like before, he would have made the rankings.
Shirone didn't mind, and shortly after, he received a communication from the Operator.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: It's me. I've revived.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I see.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: As promised, I'll help you with your task. But first, I need to announce something. I'm going to delete my code name.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sorry, because of me.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: It's okay. My undefeated record is broken anyway. When I come back, I want to start fresh too.
With that, the communication ended, and the Operator made an announcement to the world using her administrative authority.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: This is the Operator.
Hearing the voice from the sky, all East Country users at the Solar Palace came outside.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: There were many issues in this Solar War. Most notably, my defeat.
It was quiet.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Looking back, a lot has happened in High Gear. Memories that are irreplaceable.
With a tone of farewell, even the rankers reminisced about their time with her.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: I want to start anew. But before that, I have something to tell you all.
The announcement paused.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: It was a significant decision for the Operator, so users were willing to wait as long as needed.
From this moment on, I…
At that moment.
An event will occur shortly.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: What?
As users murmured, the horizon began to distort horribly.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: It's tearing through the code.
New episode. Dr. Martin's Revenge. He will descend to steal the sun forever.
From the grotesque crack on the horizon, a giant eye stared at them.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: An eye?
The next moment, the eye broke through the landscape, revealing Dr. Martin's face made of scrap metal.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: The time has come! Foolish creatures! You will pay for betraying the gods!
The ground shook from the sound alone.
As users struggled to grasp the situation, the operator's meeting room became chaotic.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: Stop it quickly! We didn't even announce it! And what's Dr. Martin's Revenge?

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: This wasn't the planned event. The only one who could do this is Number Seven.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: Whatever it is, end it!
Most of the administrative authority is blocked. It's a well-crafted program. We can't break through immediately.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: What?
The operators checked.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: Accessing the code with their authority, they only received denial messages.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: This madman…
In a dark space filled with hundreds of screens, Number Seven stood alone.
Having confirmed everything happening in High Gear, he entered the final approval code.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: This ends the service.
Dr. Martin's machine, made from all High Gear designs, invaded the world.
Watching the Operator's face on the screen, Number Seven bit his lip.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: You're quitting?

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: What about everything we've done?

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: No, you can never quit. So watch closely. The world of High Gear…

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: The world you loved the most.

blocks.speaker: Number Seven
blocks.content: See how it abandons you.
As Dr. Martin tore through the landscape and slammed his fists into the ground, a thunderous noise erupted.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Finally, my grand ambition is realized! I will destroy Low Gear! Immortality ends here!
His lower body was not visible.
Only his upper body, having pierced through the code, sat on the horizon like a rising sun.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: What is this new event? How will we generate power if Low Gear is destroyed?
Starting the new episode.
Dr. Martin's face, patched with various metal structures, twisted.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Die.
A beam from one eye scraped the ground, burning West Country users.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Dodge!
Despite quick reactions, 42 users vanished, and shortly after, Little Witch received a communication.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: After receiving the report, she spoke to the Operator.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Connection is impossible.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: What?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: If you die, you're ejected from High Gear. I don't know why, but reconnection is impossible.
Finally sensing the gravity of the situation, the Operator received a message from an admin.

blocks.speaker: Admin
blocks.content: It's serious! Number Seven plans to shut down High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: The admins are tied up.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: This…
Before she could voice her anger, Dr. Martin's second beam scraped the ground.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Ugh!
Though fewer died, the West Country's camp was in disarray.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh2
blocks.content: Operator!
Sliding to a stop, Shirone arrived with East Country users.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What's going on?

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: It's an emergency. One of the admins has rebelled. If this continues, High Gear's service will end.
All their conversations were relayed to users across the continent through the forum.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Martin
blocks.content: Kahahaha! Yes, you wouldn't dare challenge me! Then I'll destroy the Solar Palace right now!
Users murmured.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: How is this fair? I worked so hard to gather parts! We have to stop him!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How? Can't you see the level?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Level 3,300? And…
Users checking the durability through augmented reality were dismayed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We can do it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If East and West Country users unite, we can take him down. We can't end it like this!

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yes. We'll fight.
Turning around, the Operator shouted.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: All hands to battle stations! We will defeat Dr. Martin and protect the Solar Palace! All users watching this video, come to the Zeta Plateau!
Click! Click!
East and West Country users simultaneously loaded their bullets.
